task_completion.description: Open the fire investigation report in Calligra Words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Calligra Words window is open displaying the document 'fire_investigation_report.odt'.

task_completion.description: Format the title and insert a Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Fire Investigation Report' is styled prominently as a title at the beginning of the document. A generated Table of Contents is visible, listing the document's sections.

task_completion.description: Apply heading hierarchy to sections and subsections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Main sections (e.g., Executive Summary, Scene Documentation) are styled distinctly as Heading 1, and subsections (e.g., Exterior Survey, Interior Survey) are styled as Heading 2.

task_completion.description: Apply justified alignment to body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Paragraphs (e.g., 'This report documents the fire investigation...') have straight, flush edges on both the left and right margins, indicating justified alignment.
Terms such as 'Area of Origin', 'Point of Origin', 'Cause Classification: Accidental', 'First Fuel Ignited', and 'Ignition Source' are formatted in bold text.
At least one data table is visible in the document, organizing information into rows and columns.

task_completion.description: Save the completed document to its original path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save button is clicked, a save dialog confirms the path '/home/ga/Documents/fire_investigation_report.odt', or the window title does not show an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: Agent used Calligra Words GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Calligra Words interface being used (menus, toolbars, dialogs) rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the .odt file.

integrity.description: The document retains its original incident content.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text contains original keywords like '1847 Oakwood Drive', 'Incident #2025-03847', and 'space heater' rather than being replaced by generic text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python or bash scripts to bypass GUI formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing python scripts or command-line archive tools modifying the .odt file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be edited in Calligra Words. Expected H1 sections: Executive Summary, Incident Background, Scene Documentation, Origin Analysis, Cause Analysis, Fire Spread Analysis, Evidence Collection, Witness Statements, Photo Log. Expected H2 subsections: Exterior Survey, Interior Survey, Utilities Assessment, Fire Pattern Indicators, Area of Origin Determination, Ignition Source Analysis, Cause Classification. Title: 'Fire Investigation Report'. Key terms to be bolded: 'Area of Origin', 'Point of Origin', 'Cause Classification: Accidental', 'First Fuel Ignited', 'Ignition Source'. Body text must be justified. Content keywords to verify document authenticity: '1847 Oakwood Drive', 'Incident #2025-03847', 'Class II-B', 'V-pattern', 'arc mapping', 'polyester bedding', 'space heater', 'Chief Martinez', 'NFPA 921'.
